tasks.subject: Task 1 (#6): Implement EphemeralIndex module
tasks.description:
**Goal:** New `EphemeralIndex` module providing store-backed CRUD for the discovery index, with locked RMW writes + lock-free reads, mirroring `Ledger`'s pattern.

**Files:**
- Create: `src/kinoforge/core/warm_reuse/ephemeral_index.py`
- Test: `tests/core/warm_reuse/test_ephemeral_index.py`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `EphemeralIndexRow` is a frozen dataclass with exactly 6 fields
- [ ] `add(row)` is locked RMW + idempotent on id
- [ ] `remove(pod_id)` is locked RMW + no-op on missing
- [ ] reads lock-free + tolerate FileNotFoundError + malformed JSON
- [ ] `to_entry_dict()` synthesizes `tags.kinoforge_key` + top-level `warm_attach_key`

**Verify:** `pixi run pytest tests/core/warm_reuse/test_ephemeral_index.py -v`

**Steps:** RED 11-test suite → write module → GREEN → ruff/mypy → commit. Full code in plan §Task 1.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/core/warm_reuse/ephemeral_index.py", "tests/core/warm_reuse/test_ephemeral_index.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/core/warm_reuse/test_ephemeral_index.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["EphemeralIndexRow frozen 6-field dataclass", "add locked RMW + idempotent on id", "remove locked RMW + no-op on missing", "reads lock-free + tolerate FileNotFoundError + malformed JSON", "to_entry_dict synthesizes tags.kinoforge_key + top-level warm_attach_key"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2 (#7): Wire EphemeralIndex into matcher
tasks.description:
**Goal:** `find_warm_attach_candidate` accepts optional `ephemeral_index=` kwarg; merges its rows into ledger candidate list; ledger wins on `id` collision. `try_warm_attach_with_swap` forwards kwarg.

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/kinoforge/core/warm_reuse/matcher.py`
- Modify: `src/kinoforge/core/warm_reuse/integration.py`
- Test: `tests/core/warm_reuse/test_matcher_ephemeral_index.py`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Default `ephemeral_index=None` keeps current behavior bit-identical
- [ ] Union dedupes by id (ledger-first)
- [ ] Sparse index rows route through existing `re_probe` path
- [ ] `try_warm_attach_with_swap` forwards kwarg

**Verify:** `pixi run pytest tests/core/warm_reuse/test_matcher_ephemeral_index.py tests/core/test_warm_reuse_matcher.py tests/core/test_warm_reuse_integration.py -v`

**Steps:** RED 4-test suite → matcher sig change + union block → integration.py forward kwarg → GREEN → ruff/mypy → commit. Full code in plan §Task 2.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/core/warm_reuse/matcher.py", "src/kinoforge/core/warm_reuse/integration.py", "tests/core/warm_reuse/test_matcher_ephemeral_index.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/core/warm_reuse/test_matcher_ephemeral_index.py tests/core/test_warm_reuse_matcher.py tests/core/test_warm_reuse_integration.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["default None preserves regression", "union dedupes id ledger-first", "sparse rows trigger re_probe", "integration helper forwards kwarg"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3 (#8): Write site + _scan_warm_candidates + _dry_run_swap_preview wiring
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Write index row at cold-create under `--ephemeral`; consume index in both production warm-reuse paths.

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/kinoforge/cli/_commands.py` (write site ~L560; `_scan_warm_candidates` ~L1131; `_dry_run_swap_preview` ~L346)
- Test: `tests/core/warm_reuse/test_scan_warm_candidates_ephemeral_index.py`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Under `--ephemeral` cold-create writes one row per pod
- [ ] Without `--ephemeral` no row is written (gated)
- [ ] `_scan_warm_candidates` unions index rows
- [ ] `_dry_run_swap_preview` forwards `ephemeral_index=`

**Verify:** `pixi run pytest tests/core/warm_reuse/test_scan_warm_candidates_ephemeral_index.py tests/cli/test_dry_run_swap.py -v`

**Steps:** RED scan-integration test → add gated write block after `ledger.touch(... warm_attach_key=cfg_wak)` → add union block in `_scan_warm_candidates` → add `ephemeral_index=` kwarg in `_dry_run_swap_preview` → GREEN → full pytest -x. Full code in plan §Task 3.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/cli/_commands.py", "tests/core/warm_reuse/test_scan_warm_candidates_ephemeral_index.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/core/warm_reuse/test_scan_warm_candidates_ephemeral_index.py tests/cli/test_dry_run_swap.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["ephemeral cold-create writes index row", "non-ephemeral cold-create does NOT write", "_scan_warm_candidates unions index", "_dry_run_swap_preview forwards ephemeral_index"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4 (#9): Cleanup via destroy_confirmed chokepoint + Path 3 arms
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Index rows are removed whenever a pod is destroyed, regardless of which path triggered the destroy. Centralised in `destroy_confirmed` chokepoint; Path 3 (matcher 404 + swap 404) keeps in-place arms.

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/kinoforge/core/lifecycle.py::destroy_confirmed` (add `ephemeral_index=` kwarg)
- Modify: `src/kinoforge/core/warm_reuse/integration.py::try_warm_attach_with_swap` (Path 3 arm)
- Modify: `src/kinoforge/core/warm_reuse/matcher.py` (probe-time 404 silent skip + remove)
- Modify: `src/kinoforge/cli/_commands.py::_cmd_destroy` (pass index)
- Modify: `src/kinoforge/core/reaper_actor.py::sweep` (pass index)
- Modify: `src/kinoforge/core/lifecycle.py::reap` (pass index)
- Test: `tests/core/warm_reuse/test_ephemeral_index_cleanup.py`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `destroy_confirmed(provider, id, ephemeral_index=idx)` calls `idx.remove(id)` after confirmed-gone
- [ ] Default `None` bit-identical to today
- [ ] Does NOT remove row on `TeardownError`
- [ ] `try_warm_attach_with_swap` exception arm removes before re-raise
- [ ] Matcher probe-404 silently skips + removes row
- [ ] All 5 destroy call sites pass index

**Verify:** `pixi run pytest tests/core/warm_reuse/test_ephemeral_index_cleanup.py tests/core/test_lifecycle.py tests/core/test_warm_reuse_integration.py -v`

**Steps:** RED 4-test cleanup suite → `destroy_confirmed` sig + remove call → Path 3 arm → matcher probe-404 swallow → wire all destroy call sites → GREEN → ruff/mypy/full pytest. Full code in plan §Task 4.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/core/lifecycle.py", "src/kinoforge/core/warm_reuse/integration.py", "src/kinoforge/core/warm_reuse/matcher.py", "src/kinoforge/cli/_commands.py", "src/kinoforge/core/reaper_actor.py", "tests/core/warm_reuse/test_ephemeral_index_cleanup.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/core/warm_reuse/test_ephemeral_index_cleanup.py tests/core/test_lifecycle.py tests/core/test_warm_reuse_integration.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["destroy_confirmed removes row on success", "destroy_confirmed preserves row on TeardownError", "default None untouched behavior", "integration exception arm removes before re-raise", "matcher probe-404 swallow + remove", "all 5 destroy call sites pass index"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5 (#10): Cross-session integration + visibility tests
tasks.description:
**Goal:** End-to-end offline verification that the discovery channel works across process boundaries, plus visibility-asymmetry guards.

**Files:**
- Create: `tests/integration/test_ephemeral_cross_session_warm_reuse.py`
- Create: `tests/integration/test_non_ephemeral_consumes_index.py`
- Create: `tests/core/test_non_ephemeral_does_not_write_index.py`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Cross-session test asserts identity equality on `pod_id`
- [ ] Non-ephemeral process #2 finds ephemeral process #1's pod
- [ ] Non-ephemeral process #1 does NOT write index file

**Verify:** `pixi run pytest tests/integration/test_ephemeral_cross_session_warm_reuse.py tests/integration/test_non_ephemeral_consumes_index.py tests/core/test_non_ephemeral_does_not_write_index.py -v`

**Steps:** Write 3 tests → expect GREEN immediately (prior tasks wired the machinery) → commit. Full code in plan §Task 5.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["tests/integration/test_ephemeral_cross_session_warm_reuse.py", "tests/integration/test_non_ephemeral_consumes_index.py", "tests/core/test_non_ephemeral_does_not_write_index.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/integration/test_ephemeral_cross_session_warm_reuse.py tests/integration/test_non_ephemeral_consumes_index.py tests/core/test_non_ephemeral_does_not_write_index.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["cross-session pod_id identity", "non-ephemeral reads ephemeral pod", "non-ephemeral does NOT write index"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6 (#11): AST-scan invariant for gated writes
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Future-proof against ungated `EphemeralIndex.add(...)` writes that would leak the discovery row into non-ephemeral runs.

**Files:**
- Create: `tests/test_ephemeral_index_write_gated.py`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] AST walk over `src/kinoforge/` finds every `.add(...)` on `EphemeralIndex`
- [ ] Each call inside `if EphemeralSession.current() is not None:` branch
- [ ] Exemption tag `# kinoforge:ephemeral-index-write-exempt` opts out
- [ ] Failure message names file + line + offending function

**Verify:** `pixi run pytest tests/test_ephemeral_index_write_gated.py -v`

**Steps:** Write AST scanner (model on `tests/test_no_unredacted_writes.py`) → GREEN initially → temp-break gate in `_cmd_generate` + confirm RED + revert → commit. Full code in plan §Task 6.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["tests/test_ephemeral_index_write_gated.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/test_ephemeral_index_write_gated.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["AST finds all EphemeralIndex.add call sites", "each call inside EphemeralSession.current() branch", "exemption tag honored", "violation message names file+line"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7 (#12): Live smoke — RunPod cross-session warm-reuse (RED scaffold first)
tasks.description:
**USER-ORDERED GATE — NON-SKIPPABLE.** This task was requested by the user in the current conversation. It MUST NOT be closed by walking around it, by declaring it "verified inline", or by substituting a cheaper check. Close only after every item in `acceptanceCriteria` has been re-validated independently, with output captured.

**Goal:** End-to-end live verification on RunPod that two back-to-back `kinoforge --ephemeral generate` calls share a pod.

**Files:**
- Create: `tests/live/test_runpod_ephemeral_warm_reuse_smoke.py`
- Modify: `tests/conftest.py` (add `--runlive` option if not present)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Scaffold committed RED BEFORE any spend
- [ ] `pixi run preflight` exits 0 before live run
- [ ] 1st run cold-boots; provision marker in log
- [ ] 2nd run attaches; `warm-reuse: attached to <id>` in stderr within 30s
- [ ] `pixi run kinoforge list` after both runs shows ONE pod (= run #1)
- [ ] `pixi run kinoforge destroy --id <pod>` succeeds
- [ ] `pixi run kinoforge list` after destroy: `No running instances.` AND `No instances recorded in ledger.`
- [ ] `ephemeral-index.json` row removed after destroy
- [ ] Prompt sourced verbatim from `/workspace/examples/configs/prompts/field-realistic.txt`
- [ ] Total live spend ≤ $0.50

**Verify:** `pixi run pytest tests/live/test_runpod_ephemeral_warm_reuse_smoke.py -v -s --runlive`

**Steps:** Write RED scaffold (`--runlive`-gated) → commit RED → `pixi run preflight` → run live smoke + proactively poll RunPod GPU util every 60-90s → verify post-run ledger state → commit GREEN. Full code in plan §Task 7.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["tests/live/test_runpod_ephemeral_warm_reuse_smoke.py", "tests/conftest.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/live/test_runpod_ephemeral_warm_reuse_smoke.py -v -s --runlive", "acceptanceCriteria": ["RED scaffold committed pre-spend", "preflight exit 0", "run #1 cold-boots", "run #2 attaches within 30s", "kinoforge list shows ONE pod after both", "destroy succeeds", "post-destroy ledger empty", "index row removed post-destroy", "prompt from field-realistic.txt", "spend <= $0.50"], "modelTier": "advanced", "userGate": true, "tags": ["user-gate"], "requireEvidenceTokens": [["cold-boot", "run-1", "provision"], ["warm-attach", "run-2", "attached"]]}
```
